script:
#!/bin/bash
set +e
echo '=== state right now ==='
stat -c 'master: %a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== RESTORE master to azureuser:azureuser mode 0600 ==='
chown azureuser:azureuser /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json
chmod 0600 /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json
stat -c 'master: %a %U:%G %n' /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo '=== verify mskai (azureuser) can read its cred ==='
runuser -u azureuser -- head -c 60 /home/azureuser/.claude/.credentials.json 2>&1
echo
echo '=== INVESTIGATE: is /home/<user>/.claude a symlink or real dir per user? ==='
for u in afrah aixa alejandro ashley axel cameron david emily gabriel heather jesusr jose kaye lia neil neilc rosi stephanie zahid; do
  if [ -L /home/$u/.claude ]; then
    echo "$u SYMLINK -> $(readlink /home/$u/.claude)"
  elif [ -d /home/$u/.claude ]; then
    echo "$u realdir $(stat -c '%a %U:%G' /home/$u/.claude)"
  else
    echo "$u MISSING"
  fi
done
echo '===END==='
